title: democracy
description: my allegiance is to the republic, to democracy
body:
# democracy
yeah
## requires fabric api

this mod is made for snapshot 23w13a_or_b and for FlashFest 2023.

It adds new vote rules that do some very specific and weird things, such as open automatically open links to a certain music video from a certain british singer-songwriter who wrote a certain song about not giving up on someone, or crashing the game and printing the entire bee movie script in the crash log.

it also adds bribery to the voting system. (thanks acikek for making it fancy lol)

happy april fools day! (even though i finished this late)

# note
this mod deliberately crashes the game sometimes.
im not gonna support this so if theres any major bugs so be it ig (unless there is a genuine need for it)
